locale_scope: PS1 data; natural rows exclude promotional placeholder paths for Panjyamon, Gigadramon, and MetalEtemon

global_rules.natural_evolution: Meet the listed stat thresholds; unlisted stats are ignored.
global_rules.stats_group: All listed stat thresholds must be met; unlisted stats are ignored.
global_rules.stage_counter_reset: Per-stage counters reset after evolutions that change level.
